title: Middle Eastern Tagine
description: A flavorful and comforting dish featuring garbanzo beans, chicken, and aromatic spices. Serve over couscous for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, turmeric, and cinnamon, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the garbanzo beans, garbanzo bean broth, and shio-koji-cure, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook, covered, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt to taste, and serve over couscous.
Note: If using shio-koji-cure, reduce the amount of salt called for in the recipe to 1/4 teaspoon.
